scripts.setup: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); bun i && GINI_PROVIDER=codex GINI_MODEL=gpt-5.5 bun run gini install --instance "$instance"
scripts.remoteSetup: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); bun i && GINI_PROVIDER=codex GINI_MODEL=gpt-5.5 bun run gini install --instance "$instance"
scripts.run: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); session="gini-$instance"; tmux new-session -A -s "$session" "bun run gini run --instance $instance"
scripts.archive: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); tmux kill-session -t "gini-$instance" 2>/dev/null || true; bun run gini uninstall --instance "$instance" && rm -rf node_modules "$HOME/.claude/projects/$(echo "$PWD" | sed 's|/|-|g')"
